haiku45.summary_excerpt: Workflow is broken. (1) Line 20: action ref unpinned (needs SHA, not 'v4'). (2) Line 25: references non-existent test file—fails immediately. (3) 'aggregate' expects fixtures workflow doesn't create. (4) Missing: test harness, fixture setup, act-result.txt. Module logic is solid but workflow is non-functional; task requirements unmet.

gemini31pro.summary_excerpt: Excellent PS/GHA implementation. Proper module separation, efficient StringBuilder use (psm1:178). Robust multi-format parsing (psm1:22, 79). Workflow uses least-privilege (yml:14) and native pwsh. GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY integration (script:20) is spot on.
